name: Slide Deck
description: Generates standalone HTML slide decks from a short prompt, using the workspace's saved brand configuration.
author: Beam Hackathon Team

fields.name: primaryColor
fields.label: Primary color
fields.description: Hex color used for slide headings and structural accents.

fields.name: accentColor
fields.label: Accent color
fields.description: Hex color used for highlights and callouts on body content.

fields.name: fontFamily
fields.label: Font family
fields.description: CSS font-family stack applied to every slide.

fields.name: logoPath
fields.label: Logo path
fields.description: Path or URL to a logo shown on the title slide and footer. Leave blank to omit.
